title: About
text: My name is Kendal, and I’m a junior in the College of Journalism at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln. I am a double major in Advertising & Public Relations and Sports Media. This is a blog about my sports data projects in my SPMC 350 class!

title: Does Nebraska Volleyball Peak Too Early in the Season?
